mapper.select: select s.id, s.avatar, s.student_name, s.institution_id, ps.relation, s.birth, s.school, s.address, s.sex, s.create_time, s.update_time from parent_student ps left join student s on s.id = ps.student_id where ps.parent_id = #{dto.parentId}

SELECT s.* FROM student s
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_record cr JOIN teacher_course tc ON cr.course_id = tc.course_id WHERE cr.student_id = s.id AND tc.teacher_id = #{dto.teacherId} )
AND s.sex = #{dto.sex}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM class_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = s.id)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM class_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = s.id)
AND ( s.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR s.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM parent_student ps JOIN parent p ON ps.parent_id = p.id WHERE ps.student_id = s.id AND p.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') ) )
ORDER BY s.update_time DESC, s.id DESC

SELECT s.* FROM student s
s.institution_id = #{dto.institutionId}
AND s.sex = #{dto.sex}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM class_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = s.id)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM class_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = s.id)
AND ( s.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR s.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') -- 改为 EXISTS 子查询，避免 JOIN 导致重复 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM parent_student ps JOIN parent p ON ps.parent_id = p.id WHERE ps.student_id = s.id AND p.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') ) )
ORDER BY s.update_time DESC, s.id

select s.*, ps.relation, cr.course_total_time, cr.course_rest_time, p.phone from class_student as cs left join class c on c.id = cs.class_id left join student s on s.id = cs.student_id left join course_record as cr on cr.student_id = s.id and cr.course_id = c.course_id left join parent_student as ps on ps.student_id = s.id and ps.is_primary = true left join parent p on ps.parent_id = p.id where cs.class_id = #{dto.classId}
SELECT s.*, cr.course_total_time, cr.course_rest_time from student as s left join course_record as cr on s.id = cr.student_id where cr.course_id = #{dto.courseId} order by s.update_time desc, s.id
